title: Flight Ring
description: Adds the Flight Ring that allows you to fly (Like the Angel Ring of Extra Utilities)
body:
**[![Discord Badge](https://img.shields.io/discord/1051116089133777016?color=green&label=Discord&logo=Discord&logoColor=green&style=for-the-badge)](https://discord.gg/jVmUTGFMX5)**  

**Flight Ring**

**Flight Ring** adds a magical ring that grants full creative-style flight to the player while equipped.

 
*** ## ⚙️ How It Works The Flight Ring allows the player to fly exactly like in Creative Mode, but only while the ring is actively equipped. Removing or unequipping the ring immediately disables flight. **Equipable locations:** * Main Hand * Off Hand * Trinkets slots * Accessories slots * Curios slots *** ## 📌 Compatibility & Versions * Compatible with: Trinkets, Accessories, Curios (if present). * Works in Singleplayer and Multiplayer. * **Actively supported versions:** Minecraft 1.20.1 - 1.21.x . *** [![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/876772/description_6d4f6009-faa6-4fc7-b383-09cbfa61ac12.webp)](https://blocklegend001.dev/bh)
